zh.lifeSummary: 當Rose Serle於1511年出生在英國肯特維也時，她的父親John Serlys51歲，母親Alice Serlys47歲。她於1538年與William Proude在英國肯特沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1547年在英國肯特享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rose Serle于1511年出生在英国肯特維也时，她的父亲John Serlys51岁，母亲Alice Serlys47岁。她于1538年与William Proude在英国肯特沃爾坦结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1547年在英国肯特享年36岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Serle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Searle
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Serle, Serlo, Serily (ancient Germanic Sarilo, Serilo, possibly derived from a root sarw- ‘device, craft, skill, armor’ + suffix -il-), cognate with Old Norse Sǫrli. The name was frequent in Normandy and became common in England after the Conquest.

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: When Rose Serle was born in 1511, in Wye, Kent, England, her father, John Serlys, was 51 and her mother, Alice Serlys, was 47. She married William Proude in 1538, in Waltham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1547, in Kent, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rose Serle est née en 1511, à Wye, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John Serlys, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Alice Serlys, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé William Proude en 1538, à Waltham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1547, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rose Serle 1511 in Wye, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Serlys 51 und ihre Mutter Alice Serlys 47. Sie hat 1538 in Waltham, Kent, England William Proude geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1547 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Serle è nata il nel 1511 nel Wye, Kent, England, sua padre, John Serlys, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Alice Serlys, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato William Proude nel 1538, nel Waltham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1547, nel Kent, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose Serleが1511年にイギリスケントウイで生まれた時，父John Serlysは51歳，母Alice Serlysは47歳であった。1538年にイギリスケントワルサムでWilliam Proudeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1547年にイギリスケントで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Serle(이)가 1511년 영국 켄트 윈예에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Serlys(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Serlys(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1538년 영국 켄트 월섬에서 William Proude(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1547년 영국 켄트에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rose Serle nasceu em 1511, em Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Serlys, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Alice Serlys, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com William Proude em 1538, em Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1547, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rose Serle родилась в 1511 г. в местности ви, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Serlys было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Serlys, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Proude в 1538 г. в местности валтам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1547 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rose Serle nació en 1511, en Wye, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, John Serlys, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Alice Serlys, tenía 47 años. Se casó con William Proude en 1538, en Waltham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1547, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
